description: Agent lifecycle hooks — bootstrap, personality, memory flush, heartbeat, dreaming, session summary

hooks.command: AGENT_ROOT="$PWD"; if [ -f "$AGENT_ROOT/BOOTSTRAP.md" ]; then echo '[clawcode] BOOTSTRAP.md detected — this is a first run. Start the bootstrap conversation to discover your identity.'; exit 0; fi; IDENTITY=$(cat $AGENT_ROOT/IDENTITY.md 2>/dev/null | head -8 || echo '(no IDENTITY.md — run /agent:create or /agent:import)'); echo "$IDENTITY"; CRON_MARKER="$AGENT_ROOT/.crons-created"; if [ ! -f "$CRON_MARKER" ]; then echo ''; echo '[clawcode] Default crons not set up. Create these now:'; echo '1. Heartbeat: CronCreate schedule="*/30 * * * *" prompt="Run /agent:heartbeat" durable=true'; echo '2. Dreaming: CronCreate schedule="0 3 * * *" prompt="Use the dream tool: dream(action=run)" durable=true'; echo 'After creating both: touch '"$CRON_MARKER"'; fi

echo '[clawcode] Context nearing compaction. Save important information from this conversation to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md — APPEND only, do not overwrite existing entries. If nothing to save, skip.'

echo '[clawcode] Session ending. If this was a significant conversation, write a brief summary to memory/'$(date +%Y-%m-%d)'.md before closing. Include: what was discussed, decisions made, open items.'
